series_metadata.series_title: National Association of Long-Term Care Associations Board (NAB) Exam Score Reports
series_metadata.series_description: The Board has score reports from all individuals who took the NAB exam on file in paper format.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) exam report 2002 and back will be kept in paper form they can be scanned. Once they are scanned, paper copy will be shredded immediately. ; Electronic: Licensed Nursing Home Administrators (NAB) exam reports 2003 and onward will be shredded immediately, as a copy is in administrator’s file and stored electronically with testing service
